Mohammad Labadi
Interior Designer · Artist

About the Designer

Design with
depth and purpose

Mohammad Labadi is a Palestinian interior designer and artist with over a decade of professional experience crafting spaces that are as considered as they are compelling. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Interior Design and a Master's degree in Architecture — a dual academic grounding that informs every spatial decision he makes.

Over more than 10 years of practice, Mohammad has led projects across residential homes, commercial retail, restaurants, offices, hospitality, and wellness spaces — each approached with rigorous attention to proportion, material, and the client's lived experience.

He is also a skilled 3D visualisation specialist, animator, and video director — producing cinematic walkthroughs that communicate design intent with clarity and artistry.

Bachelor of Interior Design
Spatial composition, materials & human-centred design
Master of Architecture
Architectural theory, structure & built environment
Based in Palestine
Serving clients locally and regionally
3D Animation & Video Direction
Full production — from renders to cinematic walkthroughs
